arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid vs Real Madrid: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid travel to local rivals Atletico Madrid in the second leg of their Champions League round of 16 tie on Wednesday night. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: How Morgan Rogers became a £100m Aston Villa star after getting 'lost' at Man City - and why scouts rave about a player they believe can be the new Yaya Toure or Jude Bellingham
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: As he headed for the dressing room following Middlesbrough's 1-0 defeat by Aston Villa, Morgan Rogers started to suspect something was afoot.

arts.ttl: Bayern & Real Madrid eye Man Utd's Dalot - Wednesday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester United's Diogo Dalot might move in the summer, Viktor Gyokeres continues to attract Premier League interest and Newcastle want Ipswich's Liam Delap.

arts.ttl: Man United set for summer cash windful as Bayern Munich and Real Madrid circle defender
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have joined Real Madrid in the race to sign Manchester United defender Diogo Dalot, according to reports. Outlet TeamTalk have revealed that the 25-year-old has caught the eye of Bayern boss Vincent Kompany thanks to his remarkable consistency and adaptability – while he is also admired by those at Rea Madrid. arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappé could be left out of Real Madrid starting XI vs Atlético
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Kylian Mbappé could be forced to sit out from the off when his teammates return to action on Wednesday evening. This comes amid confirmation that the Frenchman…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Atletico Madrid - Champions League
arts.sum: Real Madrid's predicted lineup for the second leg of their Champions League round of 16 tie against Atletico Madrid.

arts.ttl: Villarreal star still absent from training ahead of Real Madrid
arts.sum: A leading member of the defensive ranks at La Liga outfit Villarreal was forced to sit out training once more on Tuesday. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, who point towards…

arts.ttl: Ángel Correa earned a suspension following Getafe incident — how much time will he miss?
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid's Ángel Correa will learn the extent of his punishment on Wednesday, following his insult-ridden outburst towards referee Guillermo Cuadra Fernández in last Sunday's match against Getafe CF. Mundo Deportivo have reported the forward will be banned from a total of five matches — including a couple very important domestic fixtures.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star William Saliba makes Real Madrid transfer decision as fresh talks emerge
arts.sum: Arsenal centre-back William Saliba has made it clear he intends to stay at the Emirates Stadium despite interest from Real Madrid. The French international has been on Madrid’s radar as their top defensive target for the upcoming summer transfer window, but Saliba has no plans to leave north London any time soon. arts.ttl: William Saliba hails legendary former Real Madrid defender Sergio Ramos as the 'best in history'- before giving a nod to an 'unbelievable' Premier League rival
arts.sum: The Frenchman heaped praise on the combative centre-half, who enjoyed unprecedented success at the Bernabeu during his 16-year stay in the Spanish capital.
